header.title: Engineering Styles & Patterns
header.description: Formalized code style and architectural patterns ensuring consistency across the entire ecosystem.

restrictions.title: Styling Restrictions
restrictions.utility_description: Only specified Tailwind prefixes are allowed. Mandatory use of {{utility}} for all components.
restrictions.colors_description: Standard Tailwind colors are restricted to maintain brand consistency.

contract.title: State Management Contract
contract.description: Strict isolation of state levels to ensure predictability and ease of testing. Global state is reserved for cross-cutting concerns.

fetching.title: Data Fetching Standards
fetching.description: Centralized API interaction through RTK Query with mandatory error boundary handling.
